manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v63

- Reverted to the old context menu design in chats, since the new one has issues regarding its placement in the screen space.
- Now the "See location" button in stories is always dark for better visibility.
- You can now hold the caption of a reel to expand the comments.
- If you hold at the reels viewing space now, the options you would get by pressing the three dots will show up.
- Added a "No internet connection" banner at the bottom of the chats when you have no Internet connection.
- Minor changes.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
